description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, angular body with a matte black and gray finish, accented by white and red highlights. The vehicle is equipped with four large, rugged wheels designed for off-road performance, each with a deep, blocky tread pattern for enhanced traction. The front end is streamlined with a pointed nose and a set of LED-like lights, while the rear includes a prominent red panel and angular exhaust features. The side profile reveals a partially enclosed cabin with a transparent canopy, suggesting space for one or two occupants. Visible tubing and vent details along the sides hint at advanced suspension and cooling systems. The overall design is futuristic, with a focus on durability and maneuverability in urban and rough environments.
description: A futuristic, angular all-terrain vehicle with a matte black and gray body, large rugged wheels, and a partially enclosed transparent canopy. Accented with red and white details, it is built for durability and off-road performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, LED-like lights, and the wide stance of the front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the transparent canopy, side tubing, and the blocky tread of the wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the angular exhaust features, red rear panel, and the robust back wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible tubing and canopy, emphasizing the vehicle's symmetry.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and pronounced lugs, designed for optimal grip on both urban and off-road surfaces.
